description:
Offered: Sprinf
This course will cover topics in injury prevention, physical training and conditioning techniques and sports injury, trauma and illness. In addition, an introduction in first aid and athletic taping, bracing and use of protective equipment used to manage and prevent athletic related injuries. Prerequisite(s): BIOL 1300 and EXSS 2050 Note: EXSS majors only.
